description: Multi-model /team-review where code-reviewer (native team) raises a security-category finding (cross-domain enrichment per FR-MMT4 cross-domain SendMessage protocol). Consolidation must preserve the finding with code-reviewer attribution and original-domain category routing.

raw_findings.title: Upload handler accepts any MIME type — unrestricted file upload
raw_findings.description: code-reviewer flagged this during code-clarity review: the upload handler does not validate MIME type or file extension, enabling arbitrary file uploads. Cross-domain finding (security raised by code-reviewer per FR-MMT4 enrichment protocol).

raw_findings.title: Upload endpoint has no rate limiting
raw_findings.description: Upload endpoint accepts unbounded request volume. Combined with unrestricted MIME types, an attacker can exhaust storage.

raw_findings.title: Upload handler has 4-level callback nesting
raw_findings.description: Nested callbacks reduce readability. Consider promise chains or async/await.

findings.title: Upload handler accepts any MIME type — unrestricted file upload
findings.description: code-reviewer flagged this during code-clarity review: the upload handler does not validate MIME type or file extension, enabling arbitrary file uploads. Cross-domain finding (security raised by code-reviewer per FR-MMT4 enrichment protocol).
findings.consolidation_notes: Cross-domain finding (security raised by code-reviewer) preserved at original severity. Security exemption blocks minority-of-one demotion. cross_domain=true flag retained.

findings.title: Upload endpoint has no rate limiting
findings.description: Upload endpoint accepts unbounded request volume. Combined with unrestricted MIME types, an attacker can exhaust storage.
findings.consolidation_notes: Singleton finding from security-reviewer. Security category exempt from minority-of-one demotion.

findings.title: Upload handler has 4-level callback nesting
findings.description: Nested callbacks reduce readability. Consider promise chains or async/await.
findings.consolidation_notes: No demotion applied — already at low severity.

consolidated_output.summary: 2 security findings (1 cross-domain from code-reviewer, 1 native security-reviewer) + 1 maintainability finding. Cross-domain attribution preserved.
